_meta.note: HAND-MANAGED — edit intentionally. Controls what the LLM may query.

denied_columns_global.reason: Internal versioning / view implementation details. Must never appear in SELECT, GROUP BY, WHERE, or LLM output.

date_filter_policy.note: dt MUST always appear in WHERE; orchestrator injects it automatically. LLM must not construct free-form dt predicates.

v_latest_appsflyer_installs_daily.note_store_reinstall: Primary guardrail for installs_new_like KPI. Value is string 'true'/'false', not boolean.

installs_new_like.note: Orchestrator injects this as a WHERE filter, not a column reference.

retention_rate.note: Orchestrator injects as a computed expression, not a column reference.

query_constraints.note: LLM must always produce a GROUP BY query. Raw row-level SELECT is not permitted.
query_constraints.llm_output_format: QueryPlan JSON only — LLM must NEVER output raw SQL strings directly.

pii_flags.note: Curated layer contains no user-level identifiers (data is pre-aggregated by CTAS GROUP BY). These flags exist as a future reference.

allowlist_enforcement_strategy.step_2: Validate all GROUP BY columns against dimensions.allowed for that view
allowlist_enforcement_strategy.step_3: Validate all SELECT expressions against metrics.allowed or derived
allowlist_enforcement_strategy.step_4: Inject dt WHERE predicate automatically (no LLM control)
allowlist_enforcement_strategy.step_5: Strip any column in denied_columns_global before executing
